name: Chisato Nishikigi
description:
Said to be the strongest Lycoris of all time.
She enjoys solving private-sector problems that the DA would not address.
At Café LycoReco, she works joyfully and cheerfully as the self-proclaimed poster girl.

~!Chisato has an artificial heart which was developed by Alan Institute, and can be broken by applying high voltages directly to it.!~
